channel.title: Wordpress Sidebar in Frontity React
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
Hi - I'm using the mars theme for Frontity, but I've no idea how to display the Wordpress Sidebar? Anyone know how to do this? I assume it would be done as a component?

item.title: Wordpress Sidebar in Frontity React
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Have been there as well, when I started with Frontity so I am glad I could help.
Good luck with your Frontity website.

Read full topic

item.title: Wordpress Sidebar in Frontity React
item.dc:creator: meggsp
item.description:
that’s exactly what i’m after, but as new to frontity/react i’m trying to find the solution. this should do it, thankyou

Read full topic

item.title: Wordpress Sidebar in Frontity React
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Hey meggsp. Do you have a bite more info what you are referring to?
If you are referring to a sidebar on the blog page for example, you will need to create a component for it which you then render based on some conditions.
Once you have that you can place sidebar content within wordpress widgets and query it via the REST api to display the data.

Read full topic

item.title: Wordpress Sidebar in Frontity React
item.dc:creator: meggsp
item.description:
Hi - I’m using the mars theme for Frontity, but I’ve no idea how to display the Wordpress Sidebar? Anyone know how to do this? I assume it would be done as a component?

Read full topic
